description:
What: When return_reprs[my_sid] = Dst(k), lower Term::Return(v) to 'store v through dst pointer; tail-call cont with dst'. Cont signature changes to sig(dst_i64) -> i64 for Dst specs. Caller's cont fn receives dst, not value.

Why: Pairs with C3 — callee writes directly into caller-owned slot, no intermediate boxing.

CLIF impact: for a Dst spec — return_call_indirect(sig(i64) -> i64, cont_code, [dst]) plus one store. For a fn that previously alloc'd a struct and returned its pointer: same instruction count, alloc moves up one frame (counted in C3).

Removes: per-callee alloc of the result struct (the alloc moves to the caller).

Tests: golden CLIF for one stdlib fn before/after.
title: fz-dps.C2: lower Term::Return under Dst ABI
